JOMar 23, 2026, 1:51 PM
🧾 Their Plan (Plain English)
1. They send you USDT (crypto)
→ Supposedly from China
2. You convert it to real money (USD)
→ Using your exchange / accounts / system
3. You send them back 60% via bank transfer
→ Clean USD into their bank account
4. You keep 40% ($20M)
→ As your “cut”

⸻

🧠 What That Actually Means

👉 You are being used as the middleman to clean money
• They give you untraceable or risky crypto
• You turn it into legitimate bank money
• You send it out through your clean banking access

JOApr 2, 2026, 12:52 PM
April 30 2026 - April 30 2027


₱6,000,000 loan has a 5% total interest for the whole 12-month term:

Total interest
₱6,000,000 × 5% = ₱300,000

Monthly interest
₱300,000 ÷ 12 = ₱25,000

Monthly check amount
(₱6,000,000 + ₱300,000) ÷ 12 = ₱525,000

So:
• Monthly interest: ₱25,000
• Monthly check: ₱525,000

JOApr 11, 2026, 7:47 AM
Doc just in case itanong sakin to

Please clarify and send support for the following:

1. Is the tribal accreditation already final, or still pending?


2. What exact rights did that accreditation grant?


3. Is there already a final CADC/CADT or only a sketch plan / claim / application?


4. Are Lots 593 and 594 officially inside the recognized indigenous area? Please send the basis or overlay.
5. What is the present land classification of the area?


6. What exact document authorizes leasing to outsiders?


7. What exact document authorizes collection of environmental fees, lease fees, or occupancy-related charges?


8. What exact authority do you personally have to negotiate, sign, allocate, or collect on behalf of the tribe?

9. What authority remains with DENR and the LGU, and what has actually been recognized in writing?

10. Which parts are already legally effective now, and which parts depend on future approval?

I need to distinguish clearly between claimed rights, mapped areas, pending approvals, and rights already enforceable today.
